fault_hypothesis: The expiration check on line 73 uses a strict inequality `>` instead of `>=`. This causes entries to be considered valid when the current time is exactly equal to their expiration time, when they should be considered expired.

constraints.intent: An entry should be considered expired if the current time is exactly its expiration time.
If an entry is considered valid, the current time must be strictly less than its expiration time.
A value should only be returned if the current time is strictly before its expiration.
